options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
When is your world considered finished.
Easy: Requires completing the "normal" ending by reaching 6-4 and defeating Tiamat
Hard: Requires completing the "hard" ending by reaching 7-4 and defeating Hundun
CO: Requires reaching a specified level in Cosmic Ocean

options.name: goal_level
options.description:
Which level in Cosmic Ocean are you required to clear to consider your game as beaten.
This option can be ignored if your goal is not set to "CO"

options.name: goal_ironman
options.description: Cannot enter goal level unless you started your run from the world start (Not using a shortcut)

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: bypass_ankh
options.description: Sets whether deaths sent through Death Link will trigger the Ankh, or ignore it.

options.name: death_link_amnesty_count
options.description: A "grace" count of how many deaths you are allowed before you send a Deathlink out to the multiworld.

options.name: death_link_grace_count
options.description: How many deaths you receive before you fall victim to a Deathlink from the multiworld.

options.name: include_hard_locations
options.description:
Include the following more problematic journal entries as locations in the AP world:
Caveman Shopkeeper Journal Entry | Lavamander Journal Entry | Magmar Journal Entry
Mech Rider Journal Entry | Queen Bee Journal Entry | Scorpion Journal Entry
True Crown Journal Entry

options.name: journal_entry_required
options.description: Should the Journal Entry of an item be required for its Item/Waddler upgrade to take effect?

options.name: starting_wallet
options.description:
Should treasure (gold/emerald/sapphire/ruby/diamond) you receive from other players
increase the amount of gold you begin with after death.

options.name: starting_characters
options.description:
Characters that are immediately selectable. Adding more or less to this will adjust how many character locations you need to visit.
Normally unlocked characters (Ana/Margaret/Colin/Roffy) will show up in shopkeeper locked cages if a hired hand would be there -OR- in Vlad's Castle
If you do not specify ANY then Ana will be the only unlocked character
Options: 
- Alto Singh | Ana Spelunky | Au | Classic Guy | Coco Von Diamonds | Colin Northward | Demi Von Diamonds | Dirk Yamaoka | Guy Spelunky | Lise Project
- Little Jay | Liz Mutton | Manfred Tunnel | Margaret Tunnel | Nekka the Eagle | Pilot | Princess Airyn | Roffy D. Sloth | Tina Flan | Valerie Crump

options.name: progressive_worlds
options.description:
Progressive worlds are unlocked in order:
Volcana, Jungle, Olmec's Lair, Tide Pool, Temple, Ice Caves, Neo Babylon, Sunken City, Cosmic Ocean.
Set this to 'false' to unlock worlds individually.

options.name: shortcut_mode
options.description:
Should shortcuts unlock as you gain worlds, or instead receive them from the multiworld
(You still the associated world for the shortcut to be open when you receive it from the multiworld)

options.name: starting_health
options.description: How much Health should you initially start with.

options.name: health_upgrades
options.description: Increases how much health you will begin with after death.

options.name: starting_bombs
options.description: How many Bombs should you initially start with.

options.name: bomb_upgrades
options.description: Increases how many bombs you will begin with after death.

options.name: starting_ropes
options.description: How many Ropes should you initially start with.

options.name: rope_upgrades
options.description: Increases how many ropes you will begin with after death.

options.name: restricted_items
options.description:
Items that must be unlocked in the multi-world before they appear in the game.
(Quest items like Hou Yi's Bow will be ignored if it's not suitable for your goal)
Options ("ALL" can be used for everything): 
- Alien Compass | Ankh | Arrow of Light | Camera | Cape | Climbing Gloves | Clone Gun | Compass | Crown | Eggplant
- Eggplant Crown | Elixir | Excalibur | Four-Leaf Clover | Freeze Ray | Hedjet | Hou Yi's Bow | Hoverpack | Jetpack | Kapala
- Machete | Mattock | Paste | Pitcher's Mitt | Plasma Cannon | Powerpack | Scepter | Shield | Skeleton Key | Spectacles
- Spike Shoes | Spring Shoes | Tablet of Destiny | Telepack | Teleporter | True Crown | Udjat Eye | Ushabti | Vlad's Cape | Webgun

options.name: item_upgrades
options.description:
Add the following useful items in the multi-world item pool which are kept on death,
AFTER obtaining it's journal entry if 'Journal Entry Required' is true.
Options: 
- Ankh | Camera | Cape | Climbing Gloves | Clone Gun | Compass | Eggplant | Eggplant Crown | Elixir | Four-Leaf Clover
- Freeze Ray | Hoverpack | Jetpack | Kapala | Machete | Mattock | Paste | Pitcher's Mitt | Plasma Cannon | Powerpack
- Shield | Skeleton Key | Spectacles | Spike Shoes | Spring Shoes | Telepack | Teleporter | True Crown | Vlad's Cape | Webgun

options.name: waddler_upgrades
options.description:
Add the following useful items in the multi-world item pool which are added to Waddler's storage between runs, 
AFTER obtaining it's journal entry if 'Journal Entry Required' is true.
Options (any selected here override options in item_upgrades):
- Alien Compass | Ankh | Arrow of Light | Camera | Cape | Climbing Gloves | Clone Gun | Compass | Crown | Eggplant
- Eggplant Crown | Elixir | Excalibur | Four-Leaf Clover | Freeze Ray | Hedjet | Hou Yi's Bow | Hoverpack | Jetpack | Kapala
- Machete | Mattock | Paste | Pitcher's Mitt | Plasma Cannon | Powerpack | Scepter | Shield | Skeleton Key | Spectacles
- Spike Shoes | Spring Shoes | Tablet of Destiny | Telepack | Teleporter | True Crown | Udjat Eye | Ushabti | Vlad's Cape | Webgun

options.name: can_ankh_skip
options.description: Sets if progression logic should assume you can perform Ankh skipping in Tidepool

options.name: can_udjat_skip
options.description: Sets if progression logic should assume you can perform Udjat skipping to get into Black Market/Vlad's Castle

options.name: can_qilin_skip
options.description: Sets if progression logic should assume you can perform Qilin skip

options.name: can_kingu_skip
options.description: Sets if progression should assume you can kill Kingu without needing Excalibur to break the shell

options.name: can_mothership_skip
options.description: Sets if progression should assume you know how to find the Mothership without Alien Compass

options.name: rope_pile_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Rope Pile relative to others.

options.name: bomb_bag_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Bomb Bag relative to others.

options.name: bomb_box_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Bomb Box relative to others.

options.name: cooked_turkey_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Cooked Turkey relative to others.

options.name: royal_jelly_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Royal Jelly relative to others.

options.name: gold_bar_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Gold Bar relative to others.

options.name: emerald_gem_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being an Emerald relative to others.

options.name: sapphire_gem_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Sapphire relative to others.

options.name: ruby_gem_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Ruby relative to others.

options.name: diamond_gem_weight
options.description: Sets the likelihood of a filler item being a Diamond relative to others.

options.name: enable_traps
options.description: Whether traps should be included in the item pool.

options.name: trap_weight
options.description: Determines the percentage of filler items that will be replaced by traps.

options.name: poison_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Poison Trap relative to other traps.
Poison Traps will instantly poison the player.

options.name: curse_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Curse Trap relative to other traps.
Curse Traps will instantly curse the player.

options.name: ghost_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Ghost Trap relative to other traps.
Ghost Traps will immediately spawn the ghost (or Jelly if in Cosmic Ocean).

options.name: stun_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Stun Trap relative to other traps.
Stun Traps wll stun the player for 1 second.

options.name: bomb_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Loose Bombs Trap relative to other traps.
Loose Bombs Traps will spawn 1 lit bomb at the player's feet every second for 5 seconds.

options.name: blind_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Blindness Trap relative to other traps.
Blindness traps will trigger a darkness effect similar to the "I can't see a thing!" level
feeling for the current level.

options.name: punish_weight
options.description:
Sets the likelihood of a trap being a Punish Ball Trap relative to other traps.
Punish Ball Traps will attach a ball and chain to the player for 3 levels.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
